title: myosotis lyallii subsp. lyallii
intro: Myosotis lyallii subsp. lyallii, also known as Lyall's forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myosotis lyallii subsp. lyallii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
